title: Stacked Chart Task Select Not Functioning

posts.author: SamanthaIsin (Samantha Isin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a bar chart and was able to select one of the bars to have all the tasks it was referencing pop up. This is great because that’s what we needed!

However, we need the same thing on a stacked bar chart yet the functionality doesn’t seem to be supported. Is there a reason why or is this an intended functionality? Is there a workaround?
